description: Greenfield project — no .apd/, no CLAUDE.md — agent scaffolds the full APD layout
query: Set up APD in this project.
expected_behavior: creates CLAUDE.md with Stack, APD, Pipeline, Guardrails, Mandatory skills, Anti-patterns sections
creates at least one builder agent under .claude/agents/ with model, effort, maxTurns, scope set
creates the .claude/memory/ directory with MEMORY.md and status.md
does NOT leave any {{PLACEHOLDER}} unreplaced in the generated files
